overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a neon-lit covered promenade transitioning into a foggy, rain-slicked urban street at night. The player navigates past digital billboards and other pedestrians before descending a ramp to cross a wide intersection illuminated by street lights and building neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered promenade, observing digital billboards and neon lighting along the red-carpeted walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: large pink and purple advertisement with stylized female face and text FEEL THE RUSH
continuous yellow neon lighting running along the base of the left wall
continuous yellow neon lighting running along the base of the right wall
dark industrial ceiling with exposed beams covering the walkway
red textured flooring covering the entire walkway surface

segments.scene_description: The player walks through an enclosed pedestrian promenade illuminated by yellow neon strip lights along the walls. The floor is covered in red carpet, and large digital billboards display advertisements including one with pink neon text. Other pedestrians are scattered throughout the walkway, and the industrial ceiling creates an intimate, corridor-like atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp leading to street exit

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered promenade, transitioning from indoor to outdoor environment
lighting shifts from artificial neon to mixed outdoor street lighting as fog becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the sloped ramp toward the street exit, following other pedestrians leaving the covered area

entered.detail: sloped concrete walkway descending from the promenade level to street level
opening at the end of the ramp revealing foggy night street with distant lights

segments.scene_description: The player descends a concrete ramp leading out of the covered promenade. The environment transitions from fully enclosed to semi-covered as the street exit approaches. Yellow neon lights continue along the walls but fade as the foggy outdoor night scene becomes visible at the ramp's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban intersection with large pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exiting the covered structure into the foggy night street with wet reflective pavement
vehicles driving past on the right side of the intersection while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk following a pedestrian with red hair, navigating the foggy wet intersection

notable_agents.action: woman with bright red hair and white crop top walking ahead across the crosswalk

entered.detail: rain-slicked dark asphalt reflecting street lights and neon signs
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow parallel stripes and red WAIT X markings
tall street light illuminating the foggy intersection with white light
dark night sky obscured by thick fog diffusing the city lights
tall buildings with illuminated advertisements and purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide, foggy urban intersection with wet streets reflecting the ambient neon and street lighting. Following a pedestrian with distinctive red hair, the camera crosses the broad yellow-striped crosswalk. Tall buildings with glowing advertisements line the street, and sparse vehicle traffic passes by as the fog creates a moody, atmospheric night scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a neon-lit enclosed promenade that maintains an intimate, industrial atmosphere. It begins with a walk along a red-carpeted floor, guided by yellow neon strip lights lining the walls. As the camera advances, the view opens up to reveal large digital billboards, including one flashing with vibrant pink neon text. The scene continues past scattered pedestrians under a heavy industrial ceiling, moving steadily through the corridor-like space.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered neon promenade into a wide, fog-shrouded urban intersection at night. It begins as the camera descends a concrete ramp, moving from a fully enclosed space toward a semi-covered exit where the yellow neon wall lights gradually fade. As the player emerges from the ramp, the environment opens into a vast street scene where the air thickens with fog and the ground becomes rain-slicked. The camera then follows a red-haired pedestrian across a broad, yellow-striped crosswalk, with the lighting shifting to a moody blend of street lamps and glowing advertisements reflecting off the wet pavement. Finally, the view expands to reveal tall buildings and sparse vehicle traffic drifting through the atmospheric haze of the city.
